title: equisetum sylvaticum var. multiramosum
intro: Equisetum sylvaticum var. multiramosum, also known as the woodland horsetail, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Equisetaceae. It is a perennial plant with numerous branching stems and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Equisetum sylvaticum var. multiramosum include reducing inflammation, treating kidney stones, and supporting urinary health, as well as providing antioxidant and immune-boosting effects. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
